item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 041300Z AUTO 29005KT 9999 -TSRA SCT029/// BKN035/// BKN056/// ///CB 15/14 Q1011 TEMPO 2500 TSRA BKN008CB
🟡 TAF LFOT 041100Z 0412/0512 VRB03KT 9999 BKN020 TEMPO 0412/0419 4000 SHRA BKN012TCU PROB40 TEMPO 0412/0415 2500 TSRA BKN008CB TEMPO 0501/0509 4000 -RA BKN004 TEMPO 0509/0512 4000 RA BKN006
